name: The Beach
overview: Filmmaker Warwick Thornton's international success has come at a personal cost. He has reached a crossroad in his life and something has to change. He has chosen to try giving up life in the fast lane for a while, to go it alone, on an isolated beach in one of the most beautiful yet brutal environments in the world, to see if he can transform and heal his life.

trailers.title: The Beach | Trailer | Premieres on NITV, SBS Australia and SBS On Demand on Friday, 29 May at 7.30pm
